returnReasons.subtitle: Manage reasons for returned items.
returnReasons.calloutHint: Manage the reasons to categorize returns.

create.subtitle: Specify the most common reasons for returns.
create.hint: Create a new return reason to categorize returns.

edit.subtitle: Edit the value of the return reason.

delete.confirmation: You are about to delete the return reason "{{label}}". This action cannot be undone.

value.label: Value
value.tooltip: The value should be a unique identifier for the return reason.

refundReasons.subtitle: Manage reasons for issuing refunds.
refundReasons.calloutHint: Manage the reasons to categorize refunds.

create.subtitle: Specify the most common reasons for refunds.
create.hint: Create a new refund reason to categorize refunds.

edit.subtitle: Edit the value of the refund reason.

delete.confirmation: You are about to delete the refund reason "{{label}}". This action cannot be undone.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Customer had a bad shopping experience
